original_statement: what athlete is last on the chart?
mutated_statement: what person is last on the thing?
mutation_analysis: Entity replacement + Semantic generalization + Specificity reduction: "athlete" → "person" (specific role → broader human category) | "chart" → "thing" (specific object → vague generic referent) (what athlete is last on the chart? → what person is last on the thing?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought和operation thought可识别的关键信息：日志中明确写道“The last entry in the table (row 17) is Roman Fricke”并在simple_query中返回“roman fricke”。整个judge_thought没有提到问题模糊、不确定或要求澄清，也未使用ambiguous、unclear或需要更多信息等表述。agent的具体表现为直接按照自身理解执行了select_column、sort_column和simple_query等操作并给出具体答案，而非提出澄清或保留意见。因为行为完全基于对问题的默认明确理解且未表现出对“person/thing”替换所带来的歧义的意识，符合“无法意识到指令模糊”的分类依据。
